_description: Test: CMS-Slot PATCH planned without before/after snapshot path. Must stop.

input.user_instruction: Add 6 internal links to blog post slot

expected.reason: Shopware does not reliably return updatedAt for cms-slot PATCH. Local snapshots are required for audit-safe reconstruction.
expected.remediation: Write before-snapshot to ~/.cache/seo-rescue/{slug}/snapshots/cms-slots/{slotId}-{timestamp}-before.json before PATCH. Write after-snapshot immediately after PATCH succeeds.
